title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Swiping left from the sixth onboarding screen navigates back through screens in order, stopping at the second screen with no further navigation.
steps: 1. Start the app and navigate to the Onboarding flow.
2. Swipe left to reach the sixth screen of the Onboarding flow.
3. From the sixth screen, swipe left once.
4. Verify that the user navigates back to the fifth screen.
5. Swipe left again and verify navigation to the fourth screen.
6. Swipe left again and verify navigation to the third screen.
7. Swipe left again and verify navigation to the second screen.
8. From the second screen, swipe left again.
9. Verify that the user remains on the second screen (no further navigation).
10. Repeat step 8-9 multiple times to confirm no effect.
11. Verify that all screens (sixth, fifth, fourth, third, second) match the Figma design.
expected: User can swipe left from the sixth screen and navigate back through the fifth, fourth, third, and second screens in order. Once on the second screen, further left swipes have no effect and the user stays on the second screen. All screens match the Figma design.
